why: Enable vault knowledge injection for this project
output: Persisted link record with vault ID, project path, and link timestamp

success_handling.criteria: Database write completes and link record is retrievable

error_handling.criteria: Database unique constraint violation on vault_id + project_path combination
error_handling.action: Return error indicating this vault is already linked to this project

event.message: Vault is already linked to this project: {vault_name} -> {project_path}

error_handling.criteria: SQLite write operation throws an error (SQLITE_BUSY, SQLITE_CORRUPT, etc.)
error_handling.action: Abort link operation, report database error

event.message: Failed to write link to database: {error}

decisions.outcome: Abort, inform user link already exists
